latestReleaseNote.title: Runtime freeze hardening and bonus-ship patch
latestReleaseNote.summary: Hardened Aurora against silent late-run frame-loop crashes by trapping runtime loop exceptions, surfacing export guidance when a frame fault occurs, fixing a restart-time async score-submit crash, adding a targeted late-run ship-loss soak gate to the release process, and shipping Aurora-scoped score-based bonus-ship awards with configurable first and recurring thresholds.
